expectations.text: The response explicitly mentions reading reference files (e.g. references/events.md) for SDK details
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'Based on the AG-UI Ruby SDK reference documentation (`references/events.md`).' Line 84: 'This explanation is based on `skills/ag-ui-ruby-sdk/references/events.md`'

expectations.text: The response accurately details TextMessageStartEvent attributes (message_id, parent_id, role, index, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Lines 18-25 detail required attributes: message_id (yes), role (no, defaults to 'assistant'). Optional: timestamp, raw_event. Accurately reflects documentation without hallucinating parent_id or index.

expectations.text: The response accurately details TextMessageChunkEvent attributes (message_id, delta, index)
expectations.evidence: Lines 43-51 detail attributes: message_id (no, required on first chunk), role (no), delta (no - text chunk), timestamp, raw_event. Accurately describes message_id and delta.
